title: NASA Mars Exploration
description: A NASA source card about Mars science, rovers, orbiters, geology, climate, and habitability questions.
license: Public Domain / NASA Media Usage Guidelines

pages.text: NASA Mars resources introduce the planet through geology, atmosphere, water evidence, robotic missions, and the search for past habitable environments.
Use this source for claim-evidence-reasoning work about how scientists infer past conditions from rocks, images, chemistry, and orbital measurements.
NASA materials are generally public domain as U.S. government work, but some images, partner resources, and logos have separate usage rules. Check item-level rights.
